name: swap_locs
full_help:
swap_locs

Description: 
Swap two locations

Syntax: 
swap_locs  [-quiet] [-verbose] <aloc> <bloc>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <aloc>      First location (port/cell/site - should be of same type as 
              'bloc')
  <bloc>      Second location (port/cell/site - should be of same type as 
              'aloc')

Categories: 
Floorplan

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
